summary: Generate-mode testing for Pump.fun Trading Terminal with new safety features. All 21 backend API tests pass (including new safety params). 48 frontend E2E tests pass (2 skipped due to external DEX API timing, 1 flaky passed on retry). New test spec added for wallet/RPC features.
seed_data_creation: Test suite creates paper trades during execution and cleans them up via afterEach fixture in conftest.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: App is Pump.fun Solana Trading Terminal with PIN auth (PIN: 1234). Key features tested: 1) RPC Failover with Ankr primary + Solana mainnet fallback, 2) Trading mode toggle (Paper/Live) with warning dialog for Live, 3) Trading safety params (max_trade_amount_sol, max_daily_loss_sol, max_loss_streak, slippage_bps), 4) tx_signature field for Solscan links, 5) Wallet panel disconnected state. Test data isolation via cleanup fixture that closes TEST_* trades. Token scanner may show 0 tokens due to external DEX Screener API slowness - tests gracefully skip when this happens. Dashboard testids: auto-trade-toggle (not auto-trading-toggle), trading-mode-toggle, wallet-panel-disconnected.

features_verified.portfolio_endpoint: PASS - Returns correct structure with safety fields
features_verified.bot_settings_endpoint: PASS - New fields: max_trade_amount_sol, max_daily_loss_sol, max_loss_streak, slippage_bps
features_verified.trades_endpoint: PASS - tx_signature field present for Solscan links
features_verified.sol_price_endpoint: PASS - Returns live price from DEX Screener/CoinGecko
features_verified.token_scan_endpoint: PASS - Returns tokens with risk analysis
features_verified.dashboard_display: PASS - No runtime errors, all 5 stat cards visible
features_verified.trading_mode_toggle: PASS - Paper/Live toggle works with warning dialog
